articles.title: What a beautiful play!
articles.original_title: What a beautiful play!
articles.summary: Luke Kennard, you have saved my life. Gabe would’ve had me thinking homicidal thoughts on a missed wide open 3.  They need to run this double screen more often and maybe even an elevator action.    submitted by    /u/cacastrojr12   [link]   [comments]

articles.original_title: How Maxi Kleber made a big impact in his short shift
articles.summary: LOS ANGELES — On the season, Maxi Kleber has only played in 34 of the Lakers’ 59 games and averages fewer than 11 minutes per contest in those appearances. articles.title: Ayton needs to be benched
articles.original_title: Ayton needs to be benched
articles.summary: He’s playing without passion, and has zero commitment. No effort on defense, absolutely no hustle, terrible motor and coordination. Hayes and Maxi can play the center position and give 10x effort as DA. He just needs to ride the pine. He’s hurting the team a lot more than he’s of help.     submitted by    /u/Enough_Ad_5795   [link]   [comments]
